material.vendor_id: NOTE: AP total per JDR footer = $271,893.26. Vendor sum above approximates this. Submittals folder (Submittals/) contains 19 fixture + 10 material + 1 UG submittal documenting approved products. POs folder shows 82 POs (7 placed, 19 scheduled, 56 completed).

po_commitments.po_number: NOTE: Documented COs sum to $23,333.00; JDR-implied COs = $29,038.00 (diff $5,705.00). Gap likely due to budget-transfer-only adjustments or one CO not surfacing in transfer PDFs. Outbound POs: 82 total (7 placed, 19 scheduled, 56 completed) — see POs/ folder.

billing_sov.pay_app_number: NOTE: AR entries signed negative per Sage convention. Net billed = $1,208,338.00; retainage $60,416.90 outstanding on JDR dated 04/03/2026. First invoice 036686 (2/19/16); last invoice 036937 (8/18/17). Billing/billing docs/ contains SOV template. Invoice 036907 (6/19/17) reverses 036894.
